Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class ContactCleanInfo

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.ContactCleanInfo
public class ContactCleanInfo extends SObject

Java class for ContactCleanInfo complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="ContactCleanInfo">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="Address" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}address" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="City" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CleanedByJob" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CleanedByUser" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Contact" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Contact" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ContactId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ContactStatusDataDotCom" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Country" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DataDotComId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Email" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FirstName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="GeocodeAccuracy" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDifferentCity" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDifferentCountry" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDifferentCountryCode" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDifferentEmail" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDifferentFirstName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDifferentLastName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDifferentPhone" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDifferentPostalCode" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDifferentState" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDifferentStateCode" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDifferentStreet" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDifferentTitle" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsFlaggedWrongAddress" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsFlaggedWrongEmail" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsFlaggedWrongName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsFlaggedWrongPhone" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsFlaggedWrongTitle" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsInactive" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsReviewedAddress" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsReviewedEmail" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsReviewedName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsReviewedPhone" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsReviewedTitle" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastMatchedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastStatusChangedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastStatusChangedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastStatusChangedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Latitude" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Longitude" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Name" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Phone" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PostalCode" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="State" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Street" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Title" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserRecordAccess" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}UserRecordAccess" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
